name: firmament
description: Your team's shared, verified knowledge for AI agents: ask what's true about your org and how work gets done, then record what you learn. One install wires the ask & submit tools and a standing session reminder to use them.

interface.shortDescription: Your team's shared knowledge: ask before you act, record what you learn.
interface.longDescription: Firmament is your team's shared, verified knowledge base. This plugin wires the ask & submit tools (remote MCP, one-time browser sign-in) and a session reminder so your agent consults the team's knowledge on org-specific work and records what it learns for the next agent.
defaultPrompt: Ask Firmament what the team knows about this before starting.
Submit what you learned back to Firmament.
